title: Generated remediation-plan frontmatter
description: Frontmatter contract for skill-auditor-generated remediation plans (.context/plans/*-remediation-plan-*.md). These carry the standard action-candidate fields plus the generator's structured summary keys, so they validate against this schema rather than context-frontmatter.schema.json. Enum casing follows ADR-050 (effort stays S/M/L per the ADR-050 amendment).
comment: required is intentionally only the universal base fields, matching context-frontmatter.schema.json. Per-type/status requiredness (value/themes on DRAFT/ACTIVE, exempt on DONE/SUPERSEDED) is enforced by validate-context-frontmatter.sh, which runs alongside this schema; duplicating it here would wrongly reject pre-themes DONE plans. This schema's job is additionalProperties:false (catch typo'd/unknown keys) plus enum/pattern/type correctness.

effort.description: T-shirt size. Single-letter by deliberate exception to the UPPER_CASE convention (ADR-050 amendment).
